modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Boca printer and required software on laptop.

full_description_text: User needs SB Client and Ivanti Secure Access installed on their laptop. They can't access the Boca printer, which prevents them from getting into PAC. Also, they require access to the AM monitor. This is affecting their ability to work effectively.
